root_cause: Service mesh sidecar is blocking pod traffic before the proxy becomes ready
evidence: Recognized service-mesh sidecar 'istio-proxy' is present and currently Ready=False with state=running restartCount=0
Timeline shows 3 sidecar-network-issue -> application-impact sequence(s) within the last 20 minutes
Representative sidecar issue: Readiness probe failed: Get "http://10.42.2.19:15021/healthz/ready": HTTP probe failed with statuscode: 503
Representative application impact: Readiness probe failed: HTTP probe failed with statuscode: 503

causes.message: Pod includes injected service-mesh sidecar 'istio-proxy' that mediates pod traffic
Service-mesh sidecar 'istio-proxy' is intercepting traffic before the proxy is ready to forward it
Application container 'payments-api' then develops readiness-level network/probe failures after the sidecar issue appears

pod:payments-api-pod: Application network symptoms begin only after the service-mesh sidecar becomes not ready
container:istio-proxy: Readiness probe failed: Get "http://10.42.2.19:15021/healthz/ready": HTTP probe failed with statuscode: 503
container:payments-api: Readiness probe failed: HTTP probe failed with statuscode: 503

likely_causes: The mesh sidecar has not received valid xDS/bootstrap configuration from the control plane
mTLS certificates or service-mesh identity bootstrap are missing or stale, leaving the proxy unready
Probe rewriting or traffic capture is active before the sidecar can forward application traffic
The service-mesh control plane is degraded, so the sidecar intercepts traffic but cannot program listeners or clusters
suggested_checks: Inspect service-mesh control-plane health and proxy synchronization status
Review mesh probe-rewrite and sidecar bootstrap annotations on the pod
